name: Mapping the Serotonin Transporter of the Human Brain
description: This collection contains 7 datasets, 249 subjects in total, mapping the serotonin transporter in the human brain using PET and the C11-DASB (3-amino-4-(2-dimethylaminomethyl-phenylsulfanyl)-benzonitrile) tracer. DASB is regarded as one of the superior radioligands for PET study of the serotonin transporter in the brain, since it has a high selectivity for SERT
dataset_id: PNC0003 Mapping the Serotonin Transporter of the Human Brain

Description: Collection of 7 PET datasets using the C11-DASB brain PET

subdatasets.dataset_id: PN000017 Serotonine transporter data in healthy and obese participants
subdatasets.dataset_path: PN000017 Serotonine transporter data in healthy and obese participants
